cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Sangeetha Murthy? Sir, I'm calling from KPMG India.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Sangeetha. Who's calling, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: My name is Rohan, and I'm an HR representative from KPMG India. We received your application for the software engineer position on our career portal, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, yes. I applied for that role. What's the next step?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We'd like to schedule a first-round technical interview. Can you please confirm your availability for this week or the next, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm available this week. What's the best day and time for you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: How about Wednesday at 2 PM? And just to confirm, what's your email address so we can send over the meeting link, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: My email is sangeetha.murthy@email.com. You can send it there.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 51s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A legitimate HR representative from [MNC_COMPANY] calls a candidate to schedule a first-round technical interview for a position they applied for on the company's official career portal. They confirm the candidate's availability and email address to send the meeting link.
